This test checks that completion documentation renders doc links using the
file and package context of the completed symbol's declaration.

-- settings.json --
{
	"hoverKind": "FullDocumentation"
}

-- go.mod --
module example.com/completiondoclinks

go 1.20

-- sig/sig.go --
package sig

import jsonx "encoding/json"

type Value struct{}

// Encode marshals [Value] with [jsonx.Marshal].
func Encode(v Value) ([]byte, error) { //@item(encode, "Encode", "func(v sig.Value) ([]byte, error)", "func", "Encode marshals [Value](https://pkg.go.dev/example.com/completiondoclinks/sig#Value) with [jsonx.Marshal](https://pkg.go.dev/encoding/json#Marshal).")
	return jsonx.Marshal(v)
}

-- caller/caller.go --
package caller

import "example.com/completiondoclinks/sig"

var _ = sig.Encode //@complete(re"sig\\.Enc()ode", encode)
